summary: 2026-07-01 20:06:50 PDT - Correctness pass clean. Reviewed `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, full `git diff main...HEAD`, and `reviews/shfmt-format.md`; verified the four changed shell files are exactly `shfmt -i 2 -ci` output from their main-branch versions, `shfmt -d -i 2 -ci $(git ls-files '*.sh')` is empty, and `bash -n` is clean. The CI step uses pinned `v3.13.1`, the requested `fb096c5d...75398b1` checksum, `sha256sum -c`, `$RUNNER_TEMP`, and matching `-d -i 2 -ci` flags. `.claude/workflow.json` has no diff versus main; the local gate could not run in this read-only sandbox because temp repo creation was denied.
